/* MIT License http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php Author Tobias Koppers @sokra */ "use strict"; /** @typedef {import("./Resolver").ResolveRequest} ResolveRequest */ /** * @template T * @template Z * @callback Iterator * @param {T} item item * @param {(err?: null | Error, result?: null | Z) => void} callback callback * @param {number} i index * @returns {void} */ /** * @template T * @template Z * @param {T[]} array array * @param {Iterator<T, Z>} iterator iterator * @param {(err?: null | Error, result?: null | Z, i?: number) => void} callback callback after all items are iterated * @returns {void} */ module.exports = function forEachBail(array, iterator, callback) { if (array.length === 0) return callback(); let i = 0; const next = () => { /** @type {boolean | undefined} */ let loop; iterator( array[i++], (err, result) => { if (err || result !== undefined || i >= array.length) { return callback(err, result, i); } if (loop === false) while (next()); loop = true; }, i, ); if (!loop) loop = false; return loop; }; while (next()); };
